zh.Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, United: 美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Clark於1667年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德法明頓時，她的父親John Clarke38歲，母親Rebecca Marvin28歲。她於1691年與Thomas Root在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1711年11月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農享年44歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農笛卡爾 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Clark于1667年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德法明頓时，她的父亲John Clarke38岁，母亲Rebecca Marvin28岁。她于1691年与Thomas Root在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1711年11月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農享年44岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦勒班農笛卡爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Clark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

variants.name: Clarke
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clerk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Jacques.
Americanized form of French   Clerc   and perhaps also of the Dutch and Flemish cognates   De Klerk   and   De Clerck   or of variants of these names. Compare   Clark   3.

variants.name: Clerkin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Brendan, Dympna, Seamus.

Irish (Monaghan): from an Irish pet form of English clerk ‘cleric’ (Irish cléireach), see Clark . Alternatively, an Anglicized form of Ó Cléireacháin, ‘descendant of little cleric’, an Irish diminutive of the word. See also McClurkin , an Antrim surname from Mac Cléirchín ‘son of little cleric’.

variants.name: Calarco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Carmelo, Fausto, Nunziato, Salvatore.
Italian (southern): probably a nickname derived from Greek kalē archē ‘good beginning’. Compare Clark 4.

variants.name: Clerc
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Odette, Sebastien, Serge.

French: occupational or status name for a member of a minor religious order or for a scholar, Old French clerc, from Late Latin clericus, from Greek klērikos, a derivative of klēros ‘inheritance, legacy’, with reference to the priestly tribe of Levites (see Levy ) ‘whose inheritance was the Lord’. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established. In the Middle Ages it was virtually only members of religious orders who learned to read and write, so that the term clerc later came to denote any literate man, a scholar (hence its modern meaning ‘scribe, secretary’ or ‘clerk’). Compare Leclerc .

variants.name: Clarkson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): patronymic from   Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Clark was born in 1667, in Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Clarke, was 38 and her mother, Rebecca Marvin, was 28. She married Thomas Root in 1691, in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died about 22 November 1711, in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 44, and was buried in Old Cemetery, Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Clark est née en 1667, à Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Clarke, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Rebecca Marvin, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Root en 1691, à Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée environ 22 novembre 1711, à Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Old Cemetery, Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Clark 1667 in Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Clarke 38 und ihre Mutter Rebecca Marvin 28. Sie hat 1691 in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Thomas Root geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb um 22. November 1711 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Cemetery, Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Clark è nata il nel 1667 nel Farmington, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Clarke, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Rebecca Marvin, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Root nel 1691, nel Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì circa 22 novembre 1711, nel Lebanon, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Old Cemetery, Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Lebanon, New London, Connecticut, United: アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドンレバノン
ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Clarkが1667年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードファルミントンで生まれた時，父John Clarkeは38歳，母Rebecca Marvinは28歳であった。1691年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州でThomas Rootと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1711年11月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンレバノンで44歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドンレバノンオルド セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Lebanon, New Haven, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 레바넌

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Clark(이)가 1667년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 패밍턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Clarke(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rebecca Marvin(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1691년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주에서 Thomas Root(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1711년 11월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 레바넌 드 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Clark nasceu em 1667, em Farmington, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Clarke, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Rebecca Marvin, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Root em 1691, em Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 22 de novembro de 1711, em Lebanon, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Old Cemetery, Lebanon, New London, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Clark родилась в 1667 г. в местности фармингтон, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Clarke было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Rebecca Marvin, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Root в 1691 г. в местности Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла около 22 ноября 1711 г. в местности лебанон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности олд кеметири, лебанон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.
